apis.name: Create Attendance (Single Future Date)
apis.description: Creates attendance records for all employees for a single future date. Past or today’s dates are not allowed.

apis.name: Create Attendance (Full Month – Future Days Only)
apis.description: Creates attendance records for all future days only in the specified month. Existing or past attendance records are skipped automatically.

apis.name: Delete Future Attendance Records
apis.description: Deletes only future attendance records starting from the given date. Past and current day attendance cannot be deleted.

queryParams.name: fromDate
queryParams.description: Delete attendance from this future date onward (e.g., 2026-03-01)

apis.name: Get Punch Records (By Date)
apis.description: Returns all punch records (IN/OUT) of employees for a specific day.

apis.name: Get Punch Records (By Month)
apis.description: Returns all punch records for the selected month.

queryParams.name: year
queryParams.description: Year component of the month view

queryParams.name: month
queryParams.description: Month component of the month view

apis.name: Get Punch Records (Date Range)
apis.description: Returns all punch records within a date range.

apis.name: Get Attendance – Day View
apis.description: Returns attendance details of all employees for a specific day.

queryParams.name: date
queryParams.description: Specific date for day view summary

apis.name: Get Attendance – Month View
apis.description: Returns attendance summary for the given month.

apis.name: Edit Attendance Record (Admin Manual Correction)
apis.description: Allows admin-level manual correction of attendance records: Change status (PRESENT / ABSENT / LEAVE), Modify IN / OUT times, Adjust work, late & overtime minutes, and manually change assigned shift.

fields.name: workedMinutes
fields.description: Total duration worked inside shift in minutes
